scenarios.name: abundant_static_control
scenarios.pressure: abundant stable resources where ecology machinery should not matter

scenarios.name: slow_regrowth_depletion
scenarios.pressure: overharvesting slow-regrowth sources creates delayed scarcity unless restraint and regeneration memory are used

scenarios.name: spoilage_cache_timing
scenarios.pressure: pulsed food spoils unless cache rotation and spoilage timing prevent waste

scenarios.name: migrating_resource_sources
scenarios.pressure: food and water locations shift, so stale resource maps cause missed harvest windows

scenarios.name: shared_territory_pressure
scenarios.pressure: shared sources can be depleted or blocked unless sharing contracts and territory memory preserve access

scenarios.name: restore_ecology_continuity
scenarios.pressure: after restore, known depletion, cache age, migration, territory, and sharing history must survive
